title: buglossum italicum
intro: Buglossum italicum, also known as Blue Bugloss, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. It has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and digestive issues, thanks to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Buglossum italicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in the production of herbal remedies and supplements.
